features.description: Database, performance tuning, and API modularization
steps: Verify SQLite Engine optimizations: Run `sqlite3 data/agbalumo.db "PRAGMA optimize;"` and ensure no errors
Verify Network & Load optimizations: Execute `curl -I -H "Accept-Encoding: gzip" http://localhost:8443` and verify 'Content-Encoding: gzip' and 'Cache-Control' headers are present
Verify Domain-Driven Handlers exist: Check `cmd/server/main.go` and `internal/config/registrar.go` to confirm handlers are assembled via dependency injection without circular dependencies

features.description: Optimizing long-running tasks and CLI benchmarks
steps: Verify benchmark CLI constraint: Run `make benchmark` or equivalent CLI command and verify execution time is below threshold
Verify Slow-Query Thresholds: Configure `SLOW_QUERY_THRESHOLD_MS=1` and run `go test ./...` to observe slow query logs in output
Verify Stress Generation progress: Run `go run main.go cli stress-listings` and observe progress bar output in the terminal
Verify parallel execution: Check `internal/service/stress.go` to confirm `errgroup` or goroutines are used for parallel listing generation
Verify security headers: Send a request to `http://localhost:8443` and verify response headers containing 'Content-Security-Policy', 'Strict-Transport-Security', and CSRF tokens
Verify History is scrubbed: Ensure no tracked test artifacts exist in the repository history
Verify Secret Scanner: Run `./scripts/pre-commit.sh` and ensure the secret scanner step passes with no leaks detected

features.description: Manage user authentication flow and secure cookies
steps: Verify OAuth Cookie Policy: Navigate to `/login`, click 'Continue with Google', and intercept the request to verify `oauth_state` cookie is set with `SameSite=Lax`
Verify strict session policy: Complete the login flow, check the active session cookie in the browser, and verify it uses `SameSite=Strict`
Verify OAuth callback integrity: Run `go test -v ./internal/handler -run TestOAuthCallback` to ensure cross-site callback validation passes

features.description: Global Theme Rollout & Design System Refinement to Earth theme
steps: Verify Design System Update: Inspect `tailwind.config.js` and `base.html` for Earth theme definitions
Verify Earth color palette: Open the application in a browser and verify `bg-earth-dark` and `text-earth-cream` classes are applied effectively across pages
Verify Typography: Inspect text elements using developer tools to ensure 'Inter' or 'Playfair Display' font families are rendered
Verify Dark Theme components: Navigate to `/profile` and `/about` to confirm they render with the dark theme palette
Verify Standard Components: Hover and click on main CTA buttons (like 'Post' or 'Ask') to verify standard sharp edges and `bg-earth-accent` coloring
Verify Reusable Modal Shell (`modal_base`): Open the 'Create Listing' modal and verify it utilizes a dark frosted wrapper with transparent input fields
Verify Modal Refactoring (`modal_edit_listing.html`): Inspect the Edit Listing modal for proper Dark Theme integration
Verify Modal Refactoring (others): Check `modal_create_request`, `modal_detail`, `modal_profile`, `modal_feedback` for Dark Theme usage
Verify Global Micro-Animations: Hover over interactive UI elements (like filter tags or modal buttons) and ensure `hover:scale-105` visual effects are triggered
Verify modal consistency: Ensure remaining modals use the `modal_base` shell and have consistent bottom formatting, like the sticky footer for the CLOSE button
Verify Bulk Upload Feature: Open the Bulk Upload modal from the Admin Dashboard, select a valid CSV file, and submit to verify bulk listing import functions correctly
Verify Admin Users View: Log in as an admin and navigate to the 'Users' dashboard view to ensure all user records are displayed
Verify Admin Dark Theme: Ensure that the Admin Dashboard, metrics cards, Listings, and Users views fully render in the Dark Theme

features.description: Core application capabilities and user workflows
steps: Verify Claim Ownership Logic: Log in as a standard user, navigate to an unowned listing, and click 'Claim' to verify the ownership request workflow initializes
Verify Homepage Services: Navigate to the homepage and verify at least one listing categorized as 'Service' is displayed in the featured section
Verify Status Badges: Inspect various listing cards across search and category pages to verify Status Badges render uniformly

features.description: Comprehensive test metric improvements and testing tools
steps: Verify Go-based CLI testing harness: Run scaffolding scripts and verify `api-spec` and `cli-drift` validations execute successfully
Verify Baseline Coverage: Run `go test -cover ./...` and verify overall system coverage reports as >90%
Verify Phase 1 test coverage (Priority 1) (Pending): Run `go test -v ./internal/middleware -run TestRateLimit` to verify critical rate-limiting coverage is met
Verify Phase 2 test coverage (Priority 2) (Pending): Run validation domain tests to ensure configuration validation passes
Verify Phase 3 test coverage (Priority 3) (Pending): Run mock and infrastructure testing suites and verify they execute successfully

features.description: Reducing duplication and streamlining API handlers
steps: Verify Pagination Standardization: Examine `internal/module/listing/pagination.go` to ensure standardized helpers are used across multiple listing handler routes
Verify Error Handling: Trigger an intentional 400 Error and verify it returns a standard `ErrorResponse` JSON structure
Verify Response Helpers (Pending): Check for usage of `RenderSuccess`, `JSONSuccess`, and `ErrorResponse` handlers across controllers
Verify Base Handler Struct (Pending): Review handler method signatures to confirm they use a base struct to eliminate session parsing duplication
Verify Service Layer Consolidation (Pending): Inspect service layer structures and ensure validation middleware runs consistently
Verify Route Grouping (Completed): Inspect code and ensure auth-required routes are fully separated from public routes via grouped middleware

features.description: Verified all public, user, and admin routes are accessible and functional via the UI
steps: Verify Public Routes: Manually navigate through 'Home', 'About', 'Search', and a 'Listing Detail' page to check for 200 OK responses and fully rendered pages
Verify User Routes: Log in and navigate through 'Profile', 'Create Listing', 'Edit Listing', and 'Feedback' forms to verify authenticated routes open cleanly
Verify Admin Routes & Bugfixes: In an incognito window, navigate to `/admin/login` and check that the login screen renders without pre-authentication
Verify Form Validations: Submit a client form containing URL inputs with missing schemes or trailing slashes and verify the backend normalizer transforms them successfully

features.description: Continuous integration, vulnerability scanning, and build workflows
steps: Verify Tailwind CLI compilation: Run `npm run build:css` locally and ensure it successfully outputs compiled styles without referencing CDN
Verify Vulnerability scanning: Push a test branch and ensure GitHub Actions pipeline natively runs `govulncheck` and `docker scout` without failure
Verify Deploy scripts: Ensure Fly.io configuration correctly validates parameters required for deployment

features.description: Refactoring features into dedicated services and domain packages
steps: Verify Image Upload refactor: Upload an image to a listing and verify the request logs output from `ImageService` instead of an HTTP Handler
Verify Hours of Operation: Create a business or food listing with explicit daily hours and ensure the domain handles proper parsing
Verify AuthMiddleware & Handlers: Check `internal/middleware/auth.go` code to confirm it is fully decoupled from the primary AuthHandler package
Verify Date parsing: Send a raw date string during listing creation and verify it relies on strict parsing provided by the domain package

features.description: Features and architectural improvements planned for the next phase
steps: Verify Apple/Facebook Platforms (Pending): Click on 'Apple' and 'Facebook' login buttons in the identity section and configure dev accounts
Verify DevLogin Hardening (Pending): Ensure hitting the DevLogin route in a prod-like condition executes the real claim workflow instead of a skip mechanism
Verify Admin Customization (Pending): Navigate to Admin settings and inject a custom dashboard color or font, then confirm the page updates dynamically
Verify Expiration Ticker (Pending): Confirm that the background service correctly tags listings older than their configured TTL config as 'expired'
Verify Location Filter (Pending): Perform a map-based search query like `?filterLocation=City` and assert that the returned result list matches accurately
Verify Browser Integration Test (Pending): Trigger the browser integration test suite and verify 'Create Listing' finishes flawlessly start to end
Verify Security Hardening (Pending): Identify dependencies utilizing alpine:latest and ensure that CVE-2025-60876 patches are updated
Verify Fat Handler Structs (Pending): Use structural tag libraries rather than custom parsing to validate object bindings

features.description: Comprehensive security audit fixes and defense-in-depth improvements
steps: Verify ADMIN_CODE logic: Start the application without the `ADMIN_CODE` environment variable and confirm it exits safely on startup
Verify Admin Login limits: Execute 6 rapid login attempts against `/admin/login` and verify being rate-limited appropriately
Verify Content-Security-Policy: Inspect the HTML source from the browser and confirm no inline `<script>` or CSS definitions exist outside external scripts
Verify Client-side Interactivity: Click on dynamic UI components and confirm execution pathways utilize htmx `hx-on` bindings instead of standalone `onclick` injections
Verify local asset hosting: Turn off network access and render the page to see if Chart.js and HTMX assets load smoothly

features.description: Comprehensive mapping of application routes and workflows for all user personas
steps: Verify Visitor Journey: Using an automated flow or browser test, walk through onboarding, search, and deep-dive sequences seamlessly without authentication blocking
Verify Authenticated Standard User Journey: Utilize a logged-in user to conduct the entire post-claim and profile management loop gracefully
Verify Administrator Journey: Ensure admin interactions regarding users, metrics, content moderation, and batch uploads function perfectly under admin scope
Verify CLI Management Integration: Trigger local system checks over the DB for maintenance through CLI utility bounds

features.description: Refactor all scripts in the scripts/ directory to output structured JSON for robust agent consumption
steps: Verify Standard Envelope Contract: Ensure all refactored scripts output a shared JSON schema containing at minimum `success` (boolean), `command` (string), `output` (string/object), and `warnings` (array).
Verify Core Harness JSON Output (Completed): Execute `./scripts/agent-exec.sh status` (or equivalent) and verify the output conforms to the standard JSON envelope representing the harness state
Verify Drift Check JSON Output (Completed): Execute `./scripts/api-drift-check.sh` and confirm validation details and diffs are enclosed in the standard JSON structure instead of plaintext
Verify CI/Quality JSON Output (Completed): Run `./scripts/ci-local.sh` or `./scripts/pre-commit.sh` and verify the final gate summaries use JSON objects for pass/fail recording
Verify Testing & Benchmarks JSON Output (Completed): Run `./scripts/performance-audit.sh` or `./scripts/test_gate_enforcement.sh` and verify metrics and failures are emitted as JSON
Verify Utilities JSON Output (Completed): Intentionally fail a script like `./scripts/deploy_secrets.sh` or `./scripts/utils.sh` to ensure the error payload matches the standardized JSON schema

features.description: Reduce token footprint of agent context by breaking monolithic OpenAPI spec into granular files and auto-generating overlapping documentation.
steps: Verify OpenAPI Modularization (Auth) (Completed): Extract Auth-related paths from `docs/openapi.yaml` into `docs/openapi/paths/auth.yaml` and reference it via `$ref`.
Verify OpenAPI Modularization (Listings) (Completed): Extract Listing-related paths into `docs/openapi/paths/listings.yaml`.
Verify OpenAPI Modularization (Admin) (Completed): Extract Admin-related paths into `docs/openapi/paths/admin.yaml`.
Verify OpenAPI Modularization (Components) (Completed): Extract schemas and responses into modular files under `docs/openapi/components/`.
Verify OpenAPI Bundling script: Create `scripts/bundle-openapi.sh` using `swagger-cli` to bundle modular files into a built `docs/openapi.yaml` for downstream verification.
Verify API Markdown Auto-generation: Add a generation step utilizing the bundled OpenAPI specification to auto-generate `docs/api.md` and enforce a single source of truth.
Verify OpenAPI Modularization (Admin) (Completed): Extract Admin-related paths into `docs/openapi/paths/admin.yaml`.
